query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `barrels` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `user_id` int NOT NULL,
  `barrel_id` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `oak_type` enum('French','American','Hungarian','Slavonian','Other') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'French',
  `format` enum('Barrique (225L)','Hogshead (300L)','Puncheon (500L)','Foudre (>500L)','Other') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Barrique (225L)',
  `age_years` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `fill_date` bigint DEFAULT NULL,
  `last_topped_date` bigint DEFAULT NULL,
  `wine_lot` varchar(256) DEFAULT NULL,
  `notes` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `is_active` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `created_at` bigint NOT NULL,
  `updated_at` bigint NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `barrel_user_idx` (`user_id`),
  KEY `barrel_id_user_idx` (`barrel_id`, `user_id`)
);
